signals.headline: Cavaliers' Thomas Bryant Questionable for Game 3 | CONFIRMED | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Cavaliers' Thomas Bryant Questionable for Game 3 | CONFIRMED | HIGH confidence**

Thomas Bryant is questionable for Game 3 on Thursday due to a left calf strain, ending a six-game absence[5]. If unavailable, Max Strus may lose minutes as the team considers deploying bigger lineups[5].
